steps.title: Read the slope of line k
steps.content:
Line $k$ is written in slope-intercept form.
$$y=\frac{19}{8}x+5$$
The coefficient of $x$ is the slope, so line $k$ has slope $\frac{19}{8}$.

steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content: Parallel lines in the $xy$-plane have the same slope, so line $j$ also has slope $\frac{19}{8}$. The answer is B.
